trigger_examples.name: type0_gateway_concurrency
trigger_examples.prompt: Twenty long-running newsroom agents are all stuck behind one gateway and timeout tuning has not fixed it. Figure out the architecture.

trigger_examples.name: blocked_pipeline_repeated_timeouts
trigger_examples.prompt: Our multi-agent pipeline has repeated timeouts and local fixes keep moving the bottleneck. Step back architecturally.

non_trigger_examples.name: tiny_typo_fix
non_trigger_examples.prompt: Fix a typo in a README heading.
non_trigger_examples.reason: Tiny deterministic edit with no system-shape question.

non_trigger_examples.name: settled_local_bug
non_trigger_examples.prompt: A unit test expects 3 but the function returns 4 after an off-by-one change.
non_trigger_examples.reason: Local deterministic bug where architecture is already settled.
